name: rabbit-cage
summary: Owns the entire Claude Code surface and all user-facing capabilities: hooks, commands, skills for scaffolding, project management, and installation. Bug-filing and backlog management are now owned by rabbit-bug and rabbit-backlog respectively.
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native feature-container mechanism that subsumes this role
updated_note: the `updated` field is hand-maintained at the close of each TDD cycle; bump it whenever feature contents materially change
spec_no_change_reason: spec change for Inv 10a was committed in prior commit (HEAD~1) before TDD subagent dispatch
